name: Box
description: Monitor Box enterprise users and metadata templates for access management and encryption compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Box Developer Console (app.box.com/developers/console)
2. Create a new Custom App with OAuth 2.0 authentication
3. Add redirect URL: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Set scopes: Manage Groups, Manage Enterprise Properties
5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Box managed users for employee access management

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies that Box enterprise metadata templates are configured for data classification
